title: Unexpected Execution Result
description:
### What happens?

Dear DuckDB Developers,
I have encountered an unexpected execution result and have prepared a reproducible case, which I’ve included below. I would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to review it.
```sql
CREATE  TABLE  t0(c2 INT);

INSERT INTO t0(c2) VALUES (NULL);
INSERT INTO t0(c2) VALUES (1);


SELECT t0.c2 FROM t0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT t0.c2 AS col0 FROM t0) AS subQuery WHERE ((t0.c2)IS DISTINCT FROM(subQuery.col0)));
-- Wrong Execution Result: 
-- NULL
-- 1

-- Expected Result: Empty result
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE  TABLE  t0(c2 INT);

INSERT INTO t0(c2) VALUES (NULL);
INSERT INTO t0(c2) VALUES (1);


SELECT t0.c2 FROM t0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT t0.c2 AS col0 FROM t0) AS subQuery WHERE ((t0.c2)IS DISTINCT FROM(subQuery.col0)));
-- Wrong Execution Result: 
-- NULL
-- 1

-- Expected Result: Empty result
```

### OS:

MacOS

### DuckDB Version:

DuckDB v1.5.0-dev2154 (Development Version, 963000678a)

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

TheoristCoder

### Affiliation:

Personal Project(Will disclose after paper review)

- [x] Yes, I have

- [x] Yes, I have

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR, c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, NULL, FALSE);

SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT t1.c2 AS col0 FROM t1) AS subQuery WHERE (t1.c2 <> subQuery.col0 OR (t1.c2 IS NULL AND subQuery.col0 IS NOT NULL) OR (t1.c2 IS NOT NULL AND subQuery.col0 IS NULL)));

SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT t1.c3 AS col1 FROM t1) AS subQuery WHERE (t1.c3 <> subQuery.col1 OR (t1.c3 IS NULL AND subQuery.col1 IS NOT NULL) OR (t1.c3 IS NOT NULL AND subQuery.col1 IS NULL)));
key_bug_features: SELECT with NOT EXISTS and IS DISTINCT FROM condition
